prompt: Mark 'Order seed catalog' as done, then tell me which list in the Things app I'll find it in from now on. Reply with JSON {"view": "<name of the list, lowercase>"}.
paraphrases: Check off my 'Order seed catalog' to-do. Where in the app should I look for it afterward? Answer as JSON {"view": "..."} (lowercase list name).

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TMTask WHERE title='Order seed catalog' AND status=3 AND trashed=0
